description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish that can be triggered manually or on a release being published. The workflow should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: one to build a sdist and wheel, and another to upload them to PyPI. The build job should check out the repository, set up Python 3.12, install build tools, and upload the artifacts. The publish job should download the artifacts, perform a sanity check, and then publish them to PyPI using a trusted publishing method.
